corrections.note: Printed text has smooth breathing: ἐστήκαμεν, not ἑστήκαμεν.
Initial alpha has smooth breathing, not rough.
Printed text reads unaccented/without circumflex on initial iota; transcript's ἶδεν is wrong.
Apparatus lemma is Ιουδαία, not Ιουδεα.
Transcript has imported a parenthetical reading not present here; apparatus simply reads αθετησεται V.

uncertain.note: The parenthetical after ορει appears compressed; likely τω τοπω επιτηδειω / similar, but not clear enough to correct beyond existing transcription.

notes: Body line numbers at left are correctly treated as line indicators, not verse text. Running head matches. Main issues are a few breathing/accent slips in body and two clear apparatus misreadings plus one apparatus formatting/content error.
